visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man dressed in a vibrant blue traditional Chinese-style garment with yellow trim and a matching blue headcloth speaks animatedly to a woman in a pink floral traditional outfit. Her hair is styled in large black buns with a floral accessory. They are standing outdoors next to a small tree with thin branches and green leaves, set against a plain white wall under bright, natural daylight. (2) A younger woman with her hair in twin buns and wearing a white traditional top with pink trim and yellow floral patterns appears. She strikes a cute pose with her index fingers touching her cheeks, smiling brightly at the camera. The man in blue gazes at her with an expression of intense, exaggerated admiration while the first woman looks on with a skeptical and disapproving facial expression. (3) The woman in the pink floral dress points aggressively at the younger woman while speaking with a firm, serious expression. The man in blue reacts with extreme shock, his mouth agape and eyes widened. The younger woman continues to smile playfully, holding a finger to her lips as if sharing a secret, while the background remains the same outdoor garden-like setting. (4) The scene transitions to a high-density product showcase featuring numerous red boxes and individual sachets labeled 'hahababy' and 'Collagen Jelly' scattered across a wooden-textured surface. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the red and pink packaging. A hand is seen holding a single sachet, squeezing out a translucent, reddish jelly-like substance into a clear view for the audience. (5) An open white suitcase with colorful 'hahababy' character stickers is shown on a light-colored floor. A pair of hands efficiently packs various colored boxes—red, green, and blue—representing different product types into the suitcase compartments. The camera uses a top-down angle to clearly display the organized arrangement of the health supplement boxes within the travel luggage. (6) The man in blue and the two women reappear together, standing in a row and gesturing excitedly towards the camera. They are all smiling broadly and moving their hands in a celebratory, waving motion. The younger woman in the center holds her hands in a heart shape or similar friendly gesture, effectively concluding the promotional skit with a high-energy group endorsement.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 阿柑. (2) [Subtitle]: 是我對不起你. (3) [Subtitle]: 二伯姑娘這麼年輕. (4) [Subtitle]: 年紀輕輕一個人. (5) [Subtitle]: 她一個人生活我不放心啊. (6) [Subtitle]: 阿嘎 我們都要結婚了. (7) [Subtitle]: 你還想怎樣. (8) [Subtitle]: 不管啦. (9) [Subtitle]: 我現在決定. (10) [Subtitle]: 我要取消和妳的婚約. (11) [Subtitle]: 我要跟二伯結婚. (12) [Subtitle]: 你不要被騙了. (13) [Subtitle]: 她看起來雖然才18歲. (14) [Subtitle]: 其實已經86歲了. (15) [Subtitle]: 怎麼可能. (16) [Subtitle]: 她看起來這麼可愛. (17) [Subtitle]: 既然已經被你發現. (18) [Subtitle]: 我也不用再隱瞞了. (19) [Subtitle]: 什麼18歲. (20) [Subtitle]: 我年紀都可以當你媽媽了. (21) [Subtitle]: 阿娘威. (22) [Subtitle]: 什麼媽媽. (23) [Subtitle]: 她都可以當我們阿嬤了. (24) [Subtitle]: 哎喲. (25) [Subtitle]: 但看起來怎麼那麼年輕. (26) [Subtitle]: 因為我每天都有吃. (27) [Variety]: hahababy 膠原蛋白Q凍. (28) [Subtitle]: hahababy全新推出. (29) [Subtitle]: 蔓越莓膠原蛋白Q凍. (30) [Subtitle]: 內含專利魚膠原蛋白. (31) [Subtitle]: 冰晶番茄萃取物. (32) [Subtitle]: 玻尿酸與維生素C. (33) [Subtitle]: 提升肌膚修復 澎潤彈性. (34) [Subtitle]: 購買保健品大全組. (35) [Subtitle]: 除了一次補齊. (36) [Subtitle]: 酵素凍、益生菌. (37) [Subtitle]: GABA、DHA和膠原蛋白. (38) [Subtitle]: 還讓你把定制的. (39) [Subtitle]: 小怪獸兒童行李箱帶回家. (40) [Slogan]: hahababy 膠原蛋白Q凍 陪你輕鬆美一天.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 man in blue, 1 woman in pink, 1 woman in white/pink.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Characters are dressed in traditional Chinese period costumes. One man in a blue set with yellow patterns; one woman in a pink floral dress; another younger woman in a white and pink patterned robe.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initial scenes are set in an outdoor yard with a white wall and green plants. Later scenes feature studio-like backgrounds for product display and close-ups of a wooden table and a white floor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high intensity and dramatic pitch variability in Mandarin, exhibiting an energetic and comedic tone. There is a very low-level ambient room tone in the background, but the vocal is front-and-center, exhibiting high articulation clarity. No background music is present during this initial dialogue segment, allowing for clear focus on the character's vocal delivery. (2) An upbeat, electronic-pop background music track with a moderate tempo of approximately 124 BPM enters the mix. A sharp 'ding' sound effect, characteristic of a digital UI or notification, sounds as a new character is introduced. The male character's voice increases in volume and pitch, showing high arousal as he reacts to the visual change on screen. (3) A female voice with a bright, friendly, and slightly higher-pitched tone joins the conversation. The dialogue is punctuated by a series of intentional post-production sound effects, including a 'whoosh' for transitions and a 'thud' for comedic emphasis. The BGM continues steadily, maintaining a consistent rhythmic bed underneath the overlapping voices of the three characters. (4) A male narrator's voice, distinct from the characters, begins a professional product description. This voice is clear, enunciated, and well-compressed for a broadcast feel, exhibiting moderate pitch variability. The BGM remains present but is slightly ducked in volume to ensure the narrator's information about collagen and ingredients is perfectly audible and clear to the listener. (5) High-frequency 'pop' and 'sparkle' sound effects are synchronized with the fast-paced visual cuts of product packaging. These effects have a short spectral bandwidth and high transient energy. The narrator continues at a steady speech rate, listing various components like hyaluronic acid and vitamin C with a calm yet persuasive tone, while the BGM maintains its energetic pulse. (6) The audio concludes with a high-arousal group cheer featuring the voices of all three main characters speaking in unison. Their voices are loud and projected, conveying joy and excitement. The background music swells to a peak before a final 'stinger' sound effect marks the end of the video, leaving a lasting impression of high energy and positivity.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous period-drama skit as a 'hook' to capture the viewer's attention, revealing a 'secret' about a woman's youthful appearance. This transitions into a detailed product showcase for 'hahababy' collagen jelly, emphasizing its ingredients and benefits for skin repair and elasticity, ultimately encouraging viewers to purchase a bundle that includes a gift suitcase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is a direct commercial for hahababy health supplements, featuring product displays, benefit listings, and a promotional offer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-production value social media ad leveraging celebrity/influencer presence and comedy to sell beauty supplements.
